_note: Single source of truth for native test envs; run test/gen_test_envs.py to regenerate platformio.ini.

native_canopen.desc:
CANopen (CiA 301) message codec (services/canopen): NMT, SYNC, heartbeat, EMCY,
PDO, and expedited SDO read/write/abort + the COB-ID classifier, over the shared CAN
frame (shared_primitives/det_can.h). Pure host tests.

native_det_primitives.desc:
Shared no-stdlib primitives (shared_primitives): the base-10 det_strtol/strtoul/strtof
number parsers (det_numparse.h) and the strict RFC 3629 UTF-8 validator (det_utf8.h).
Header-only; pure host tests.

native_det_ip.desc:
IP address core (network_drivers/network/det_ip): RFC 4291 IPv4/IPv6 text parsing,
RFC 5952 canonical formatting (:: zero-compression, v4-mapped), and scope classification
(loopback / link-local / private-ULA / multicast / global). Pure host tests.

native_det_arena.desc:
Unified double-ended server arena (network_drivers/session/det_arena): first-fit
persistent end (bottom, individual free + coalesce + boundary shrink) + bump scratch end
(top, mark/release/reset) sharing a floating middle; fail-closed at the boundary. Host tests.

native_ssh_ed25519.desc:
Modern SSH crypto KATs (curve25519-sha256 KEX + ssh-ed25519 host key / client auth):
SHA-512 (FIPS 180-4), X25519 (RFC 7748), Ed25519 (RFC 8032). Vectors are the published RFC
test vectors + tool-generated digests, grounding the impl against the standards. Pure host tests.

native_promisc.desc:
Wi-Fi promiscuous capture helpers (services/promisc): the pure 802.11 MAC header parser
(to/from-DS src/dst/bssid resolution, QoS, WDS 4-address, control frames, malformed
rejection) and libpcap (DLT_IEEE802_11) framing. Pure host tests.

native_bus_capture.desc:
CAN listen-only capture framing (services/bus_capture): can_to_socketcan() building the
16-byte Linux SocketCAN frame (big-endian can_id, EFF/RTR flags, length, data) and the
DLT_CAN_SOCKETCAN libpcap link type. Pure host tests.

native_j1939.desc:
SAE J1939 codec (services/j1939): 29-bit id encode/decode (PDU1 + PDU2), single-frame
messages, Request PGN, Address Claimed + NAME, and the Transport Protocol (BAM + TP.DT)
reassembler, over the shared CAN frame. Pure host tests.

native_devicenet.desc:
DeviceNet link-adaptation codec (services/devicenet): the 4-group 11-bit CAN id,
explicit-message header octet, single-frame explicit messages, and the fragmentation
reassembler (CIP over CAN; the CIP body is built with the cip codec). Pure host tests.

native_nmea2000.desc:
NMEA 2000 codec (services/nmea2000): single-frame messages plus the Fast Packet
transport (frame count, build, reassembly), built on the J1939 id codec (implied). Pure
host tests.

native_mbus.desc:
Wired M-Bus codec (services/mbus): the ACK / short / long frame builders + parser
(start/stop, doubled length, 8-bit sum checksum) and the EN 13757-3 variable-data record
walker (DIF/VIF, DIFE/VIFE chains, LVAR). Pure host tests.

native_iec60870.desc:
IEC 60870-5-101/-104 codec (services/iec60870): the -104 APCI (I/S/U), the ASDU
header + 3-octet IOA, and the -101 FT1.2 fixed/variable link frames (sum checksum). Pure
host tests.

native_sdi12.desc:
SDI-12 sensor-bus codec (services/sdi12): the command builders, the measurement
response parser (atttn), the data-value splitter, and the SDI-12 CRC (compute/encode/verify).
Pure host tests.

native_dmx.desc:
DMX512 + RDM lighting codec (services/dmx): the DMX512 slot packet (build/get) and the
RDM (ANSI E1.20) packet build/parse with 48-bit UIDs and the 16-bit additive checksum. Pure
host tests.

native_nmea0183.desc:
NMEA 0183 sentence codec (services/nmea0183): the XOR checksum, sentence build, parse
(field splitting, talker/type, checksum validation) against the canonical GGA vector, and the
field-value helpers. Pure host tests.

native_iolink.desc:
IO-Link (SDCI) data-link message codec (services/iolink): the MC / CKT / CKS control
octets and the SDCI checksum (seed 0x52 + the 8->6 compression of IO-Link spec A.1.6), with a
hand-computed known-answer vector. Pure host tests.

native.desc:
Layers 4-6: transport + session + presentation + standalone parser (no app layer)
These suites predate the RFC 7230 Â§5.4 Host rule and feed bare HTTP/1.1
request lines to exercise parser mechanics; Host enforcement is verified
separately in env:native_compliance.

native_observability.desc:
Transport observability (DETWS_ENABLE_OBSERVABILITY): the det_conn_on_event
hook, by-reason counters, the live CONN_CLOSING gauge, and that the real lwIP
callbacks (recv FIN / error / timeout / local close / backpressure) drive the
right counter. Pure L4 core - host-tested.

native_accept_gate.desc:
Accept-time connection gates with their flags ON (DETWS_ENABLE_ACCEPT_THROTTLE
/ PER_IP_THROTTLE / IP_ALLOWLIST): the global fixed-window throttle, the per-source-IP
bucket table (independent budgets, window rollover, the millis() wrap, bounded LRU
eviction), and the CIDR source-IP allowlist. Compiles the flag-guarded accept-callback
paths that no other env builds. Budgets overridden small so the boundaries are explicit.

native_ota.desc:
Parser streaming-body hook (OTA) - exercises http_parser with DETWS_ENABLE_OTA=1
using a mock sink (no ESP32 Update dependency).

native_prov.desc:
Provisioning form-field parser - the only host-testable part of the captive
portal (softAP / lwIP UDP / NVS are ESP32-only and compiled out here).

native_ssh.desc: SSH crypto layer (native software paths only, no mbedtls dependency); channels multiplexed (DETWS_SSH_MAX_CHANNELS=3) to exercise routing

native_ssh_hardened.desc: SSH built with password auth disabled (publickey-only hardening)

native_ssh_conn.desc: SSH wired through the real transport/session layers (PROTO_SSH byte-pump)

native_webdav_handler.desc: WebDAV request handler over a directory-capable FS mock (recursive COPY/MOVE/DELETE)

native_diag.desc:
Runtime build-flag reporter (server.diag() / DETWS_ENABLE_DIAG). The gated
diag() method + the compile-time DETWS_DIAG_JSON build-info string are enabled by
no other env, so this one keeps them compiled + exercised in CI. Reuses the full
app src via the native_app base.

native_snmp.desc:
SNMP ASN.1 BER codec (the version-agnostic base for the SNMP agent). Pure
codec - no lwIP/UDP - so it unit-tests on the host.

native_snmp_v3.desc:
SNMPv3 USM layer: auth (HMAC-SHA-256), privacy (AES-128-CFB), engine discovery,
timeliness. Pulls in the SHA-256/HMAC primitives from the SSH crypto layer.

native_telnet.desc:
Telnet server (RFC 854 IAC negotiation + line editing) wired through the real
transport ring buffer; output checked via the tcp_write capture mock.

native_coap.desc:
CoAP server (RFC 7252) message codec + resource dispatch. Pure core - no
lwIP/UDP - so it unit-tests on the host (udp_transport provides host stubs).

native_coap_observe.desc:
CoAP with resource observation (RFC 7641) enabled. Compiles + runs test_coap
with DETWS_ENABLE_COAP_OBSERVE on, so the Observe-gated code (request Observe
recording, the observer registry, coap_notify) is actually built in CI instead
of bit-rotting (it is enabled by no other env).

native_webdav.desc:
WebDAV server core (RFC 4918): method classification, header parsing, XML
escaping, and the 207 Multi-Status builder. Pure core - no FS/sockets - so it
unit-tests on the host. The FS-backed handling is HW-tested on a real LittleFS.

native_modbus.desc:
Modbus TCP slave core + RTU framing (Modbus Application Protocol): the data
model + MBAP/PDU codec + the RTU ADU codec (CRC16 + [addr][PDU][CRC]). Pure core
- the transports are ARDUINO-gated - so it unit-tests on the host from modbus.cpp alone.

native_cloudevents.desc:
CloudEvents v1.0 envelope (services/cloudevents): the structured-JSON builder
(over the JSON writer) + the binary-mode ce-* header reader. Pure host tests.

native_redis.desc:
Redis RESP2 codec (services/redis_resp): the zero-heap command encoder + the
cursor reply parser (simple/error/integer/bulk/array/nil). Pure host tests.

native_stomp.desc:
STOMP 1.2 frame codec (services/stomp): the zero-heap frame builder (command +
escaped headers + NUL body) + the non-mutating parser (command/header slices/body,
honoring content-length) + escape/unescape. Pure host tests.

native_mqtt_sn.desc:
MQTT-SN v1.2 wire codec (services/mqtt/mqtt_sn): the zero-heap message builders
(CONNECT/REGISTER/PUBLISH/SUBSCRIBE/PINGREQ/DISCONNECT/SEARCHGW) + the Length+MsgType
header parser (1- and 3-octet forms) + typed payload parsers. Pure host tests.

native_flow_export.desc:
Flow-record export codec (services/flow_export): NetFlow v5 fixed header/record
builders + the NetFlow v9 / IPFIX template-then-data cursor (length/count patching,
v9 4-octet padding). Pure host tests with wire-byte assertions.

native_protobuf.desc:
Protocol Buffers wire codec (services/protobuf): the zero-heap streaming writer
(varint / ZigZag / fixed32 / fixed64 / length-delimited) + the cursor reader, host-tested
against the spec vectors. Pure host tests.

native_preempt_queue.desc:
Preempting work queue (services/preempt_queue), v5 real-time ingest: the host
fixed-ring core - FIFO order, urgent-to-front, fail-closed when full, high-water,
and drain/handler dispatch. The ARDUINO FreeRTOS task + ISR post + preempt latency
are HW-verified separately (the host has no tasks/ISRs).

native_dma.desc:
DMA peripheral ingest / egress simulator (services/dma), v5 hardware ingest: an
ingress feed surfaces as RX completion events, a full buffer ping-pongs and re-arms,
egress DMA is captured, TX is one-in-flight fail-closed, and a loopback channel
round-trips its own TX into RX. The ARDUINO ISR-post + preempt-queue hand-off is
HW-verified separately (the host has no ISRs).

native_forward.desc:
Interface forwarding plane (services/forward), v5 bridge / router: default-deny,
an ALLOW rule forwards, a DENY wins, multi-destination fan-out, no reflection to the
source, the per-rule rate cap (host test clock), send-failure counting, the interface /
rule table limits, and the ingress ACL (byte-pattern permit/deny, first-match, default
action). Pure host tests; the DMA-driven wiring is HW-verified.

native_gateway.desc:
Radio / wireless gateway bridge (services/gateway), v5 southbound-to-northbound: an
uplink envelopes a received frame (src address / port / rssi / seq) and publishes it,
fail-closed on no sink / unknown port / rate cap / sink refusal; a downlink routes to the
port transmit callback; the topic helper formats <prefix>/<port>/<addr>; port table limits.
Pure host tests; the DMA + FORWARD-lane ingest is HW-verified separately.

native_lora.desc:
LoRa codec + SX127x driver (services/lora), v5 radio plugin: the RadioHead 4-byte
header parse/build, and the SX127x register protocol (init / send / tx-done / set-rx /
recv) exercised against a mock chip - a register file plus a FIFO with the auto-
incrementing address pointer. Pure host tests; the RF link needs the module.

native_nrf24.desc:
nRF24L01+ driver (services/nrf24), v5 radio plugin: the Nordic SPI command protocol
(STATUS shifted out first, W/R_REGISTER, W_TX/R_RX_PAYLOAD, write-1-to-clear) exercised
against a mock chip - init / send (padded to the static width) / tx-done / set-rx / recv
(pipe-addressed). Pure host tests; the RF link needs the module.

native_enocean.desc:
EnOcean ESP3 serial codec (services/enocean), v5 radio plugin: the CRC-8 (poly 0x07)
against known answers, a build -> parse round trip, malformed framing (bad sync / header
CRC / data CRC), incomplete telegrams, over-length rejection, and resynchronisation.
Pure host tests.

native_pn532.desc:
PN532 NFC frame codec (services/pn532), v5 radio plugin: the normal-information-frame
build/parse against the documented GetFirmwareVersion command + response frames (LEN/LCS +
DCS checksums), a round trip, malformed framing (bad preamble / start / LCS / DCS), the ACK
frame, and over-length rejection. Pure host tests.

native_sigfox.desc:
Sigfox modem AT-command codec (services/sigfox), v5 radio plugin: the AT$SF uplink
command (uppercase hex encoding of the payload), its bounds (12-byte cap, output cap), and
the OK / ERROR / PENDING response classification. Pure host tests.

native_zwave.desc:
Z-Wave Serial API frame codec (services/zwave), v5 radio plugin: the data-frame
build/parse against the documented GetVersion request (01 03 00 15 E9), the XOR checksum, a
round trip, malformed framing (bad SOF / checksum / length), incomplete frames, and the ACK
/ NAK / CAN control bytes. Pure host tests.

native_zigbee.desc:
Zigbee EZSP / ASH framing codec (services/zigbee), v5 radio plugin: the CRC-16/CCITT
and the encoded RST frame against their documented values (C0 38 BC 7E), an encode -> decode
round trip, the byte-stuffing of reserved bytes, and malformed framing (bad CRC, dangling
escape, buffer-too-small, no flag). Pure host tests.

native_thread.desc:
Thread spinel / HDLC-lite framing codec (services/thread), v5 radio plugin: the FCS
(CRC-16/X-25) against its catalog check value (0x906E), an encode -> decode round trip, the
byte-stuffing of reserved bytes, and malformed framing (bad FCS, dangling escape,
buffer-too-small, no flag). Pure host tests.

native_wamp.desc:
WAMP messaging codec (services/wamp): the JSON-array message builders (HELLO /
SUBSCRIBE / PUBLISH / CALL / REGISTER / YIELD / GOODBYE over JsonWriter) + the positional
array parser (type / ids / URIs, nesting-aware). Pure host tests.

native_sunspec.desc:
SunSpec Modbus model codec (services/sunspec): the map writer (marker / model
headers / points / end model) + the model-chain walker + typed point readers
(u16 / i16 / u32 / i32 / string). Pure host tests.

native_c37118.desc:
IEEE C37.118.2 synchrophasor frame codec (services/c37118): CRC-CCITT, the frame
builder + Command frame, and the CRC-validating parser (type / ids / timestamp / payload).
Pure host tests.

native_dnp3.desc:
DNP3 (IEEE 1815) data-link frame codec (services/dnp3): CRC-16/DNP, the frame
builder (0x0564 header + CRC'd 16-octet data blocks) and the CRC-validating, de-blocking
parser. Pure host tests.

native_grpcweb.desc:
gRPC-Web message framing codec (services/grpcweb): the 5-octet length-prefixed
message frame builder + the 0x80 trailers frame (grpc-status / grpc-message) + the frame
parser. Pure host tests.

native_lwm2m_tlv.desc:
OMA LwM2M TLV codec (services/lwm2m): the writer (raw + int / bool / string /
float value helpers, 8-/16-bit ids, inline / 8-/16-/24-bit lengths) + the cursor reader
+ integer value decoding. Pure host tests.

native_fins.desc:
Omron FINS frame codec (services/fins): the command builder + Memory Area Read
convenience + the command / response parsers (10-octet header, MRC/SRC, MRES/SRES end
code). Pure host tests.

native_hostlink.desc:
Omron Host Link (C-mode) frame codec (services/hostlink): the FCS (XOR), the ASCII
command builder (@UU + header + text + FCS + *CR), and the FCS-validating parser +
end-code reader. Pure host tests.

native_senml.desc:
SenML (RFC 8428) pack builder (services/senml): the SenML-JSON encoder (over the
JSON writer) + the SenML-CBOR encoder (over the CBOR writer, integer labels), integral
numbers emitted as integers. Pure host tests.

native_df1.desc:
Allen-Bradley DF1 full-duplex frame codec (services/df1): BCC + CRC-16/ARC, the
frame builder with DLE byte-stuffing, and the validating, un-stuffing parser. Vectors from
AB pub. 1770-6.5.16. Pure host tests.

native_cotp.desc:
TPKT (RFC 1006) + COTP X.224 class-0 frame codec (services/cotp): the TPKT
envelope, the COTP Data TPDU + Connection Request builders, and the COTP parser. The
ISO-on-TCP foundation under S7comm / IEC 61850 MMS. Pure host tests.

native_s7comm.desc:
Siemens S7comm PDU codec (services/s7comm): the Setup Communication + Read Var
request builders, the header parser, and the response data-item reader (length-in-bits +
even padding). Constants per the Wireshark dissector. Pure host tests.

native_melsec.desc:
Mitsubishi MELSEC MC binary 3E codec (services/melsec): the batch-read request
builder (little-endian, subheader 0x5000, command 0x0401, device code + 24-bit head device)
+ the 0xD000 response parser. Pure host tests.

native_bacnet.desc:
BACnet/IP BVLC + NPDU codec (services/bacnet): the BVLC envelope (type 0x81,
function, length) + the NPDU header (version + NPCI control + optional DNET/DADR + hop
count) builders and parsers, slicing the APDU. ASHRAE 135. Pure host tests.

native_enip.desc:
EtherNet/IP encapsulation codec (services/enip): the 24-octet header, RegisterSession
+ SendRRData builders (Common Packet Format), and the SendRRData reply extractor. Constants
per the Wireshark ENIP dissector. Pure host tests.

native_amqp.desc:
AMQP 0-9-1 frame codec (services/amqp): the protocol header, the frame + method
builders, the heartbeat, and the frame/method parsers (type/channel/size/payload/0xCE).
Pure host tests.

native_cip.desc:
CIP message codec (services/cip): the EPATH logical-segment builder, the request
builders (Get_Attribute_Single), and the response parser (service / status / data). Rides
an EtherNet/IP Unconnected Data item. Pure host tests.

native_nats.desc:
NATS client protocol codec (services/nats): the CONNECT / PUB / SUB / UNSUB / PING /
PONG builders + the inbound MSG / INFO / PING / +OK / -ERR parser (subject/sid/reply/payload).
Pure host tests.

native_proxy_protocol.desc:
HAProxy PROXY protocol codec (services/proxy_protocol): the v1 (text) + v2 (binary)
TCP/IPv4 header builders and the unified parser (recover the real client IP behind a load
balancer). Pure host tests.

native_sparkplug.desc:
Sparkplug B codec (services/sparkplug): the topic builder + the Metric / Payload
protobuf serializers (over the protobuf codec). Field numbers per the Eclipse Tahu proto.
Pure host tests.

native_modbus_master.desc:
Modbus master codec + scanner (services/modbus/modbus_master): build read
requests, parse responses; host-tested as a round-trip against the slave codec.

native_ota_rollback.desc:
OTA rollback decision (services/ota_rollback): pure decision matrix host-tested;
the esp_ota commit/rollback are ESP32-only.

native_totp.desc:
TOTP two-factor (services/totp): HMAC-SHA1 HOTP/TOTP + base32, host-tested
against the RFC 6238 vectors (builds on the software SHA-1).

native_webhook.desc:
Webhook / IFTTT builders (services/webhook): IFTTT URL + value1/2/3 JSON payload,
host-tested. Firing is via the http_client (ESP32).

native_radio_power.desc:
WiFi radio power controls (services/radio_power): modem-sleep mode names
host-tested; the apply/readback are ESP32-only (esp_wifi).

native_dns_resolver.desc:
DNS resolver answer classifier/verifier (services/dns_resolver): host-tested;
the lwIP resolve is ESP32-only.

native_audit_log.desc:
Tamper-evident hash-chained audit log (services/audit_log). Pure - the chain is
identical on host and ESP32 - so it unit-tests on the host; SHA-256 comes from
ssh_sha256 (software path on native), the timestamp from the pluggable clock.

native_oidc.desc:
OIDC RS256 ID-token verifier (services/oidc). Pure relying-party verification -
the signature check is real RSA modexp (ssh_rsa + ssh_bignum), so it host-tests
against openssl-signed RS256 vectors with the matching JWKS public key.

native_vfs.desc:
Unified VFS wrapper (services/vfs) - host-tested through its built-in RAM
backend (the Arduino FS backend is ESP32-only and HW-verified). Pure, no heap.

native_graphql.desc:
GraphQL query subset (services/graphql) - pure parser + executor, host-tested
with a demo resolver. No heap; bounds are compile-time.

native_espnow.desc:
ESP-NOW peer messaging (services/espnow) - the envelope codec + peer registry
are host-tested here; the esp_now radio binding is ESP32-only. No heap.

native_oauth2.desc:
OAuth2 token-endpoint client (services/oauth2) - the form-body builder + JSON
token-response parser are host-tested (the parser reuses the JSON reader); the
HTTP exchange is ESP32-only. No heap, no stdlib.

native_opcua.desc:
OPC UA Binary increment 1 (services/opcua) - the type codec, UACP framing, and
Hello/Acknowledge handshake are host-tested here; the TCP server (opcua_rx) is
ESP32-only. No heap, no stdlib.

native_pentest.desc:
Adversarial / pentest harness - run SEPARATELY (`pio test -e native_pentest`),
NOT part of run_tests.sh. Fuzzes the untrusted-input parsers (HTTP, multipart,
CoAP, SNMP+BER, Modbus, CBOR, MessagePack, JSON, base64/base32) with malformed/
oversized/partial/random input and asserts bounded buffers + fail-closed + no
crash. Pairs with the live driver pentesting/detws_pentest.py. See docs/PENTEST.md.

native_keepalive.desc:
HTTP/1.1 keep-alive (persistent connections): full server built with
DETWS_ENABLE_KEEPALIVE=1; a small per-connection request cap makes the
fairness-bound test fast. Drives requests through the real transport ring +
tcp_write capture mock.

native_range.desc:
HTTP Range requests / 206 Partial Content (RFC 7233): full server built with
DETWS_ENABLE_RANGE=1, exercising serve_file() against the mock FS (now with
seek()) via the tcp_write capture mock.

native_syslog.desc:
Syslog client (RFC 5424) line formatter. Pure formatter - no lwIP/UDP - so it
unit-tests on the host (udp_transport provides host stubs for det_udp_sendto).

native_smtp.desc:
SMTP client (RFC 5321) dialogue engine (services/smtp/smtp_run): greeting/EHLO/AUTH
LOGIN/MAIL/RCPT/DATA over a send/recv seam, with dot-stuffing + multi-line reply
parsing. Driven by a scripted mock server on the host - no lwIP or TLS.

native_ntp_server.desc:
NTP/SNTP server (RFC 5905 server mode) response codec (ntp_server_build_response):
version echo, mode/LI/stratum, origin-timestamp copy, reference/receive/transmit
stamps, big-endian encoding, and the length guards. Pure - host-tested, no lwIP.

native_dns_server.desc:
Authoritative DNS server (services/dns_server): the pure A-record response builder
(QNAME parse, compressed A answer, NXDOMAIN, non-A query, header flags, malformed
guards) and the built-in name->IP table (add / case-insensitive lookup / clear). No lwIP.

native_rtc.desc:
DS1307/DS3231 RTC conversions (services/rtc): BCD time registers <-> Unix epoch in
24- and 12-hour encodings, leap years, clock-halt/century bit masks, range validation,
and a round-trip over the 2000-2099 range. Pure - the I2C read/write is ESP32-only.

native_ld2410.desc:
LD2410 mmWave radar codec (services/ld2410): decoding a basic and an engineering-mode
report frame, rejecting malformed frames, the byte-by-byte stream reassembler (resync past
noise, split feeds, absurd-length drop), the presence/distance helpers, and the exact bytes
of the config-command encoders. Pure - the UART pump is ESP32-only.

native_mpr121.desc:
MPR121 capacitive-touch codec (services/mpr121): decoding the touch-status word into
an electrode bitmask (masking proximity / over-current), the per-electrode touched test, the
proximity / over-current flags, the 10-bit filtered/baseline word, and the exact bytes of the
register bring-up sequence. Pure - the I2C read/write is ESP32-only.

native_sht3x.desc:
Sensirion SHT3x temperature/humidity codec (services/sht3x): the CRC-8 against the
datasheet check value (0xBEEF -> 0x92), the raw-tick -> milli-unit temperature/humidity
conversions at the range endpoints and a mid value, and the six-byte single-shot response
parse (both CRCs checked, corrupt CRC rejected). Pure - the I2C transfer is ESP32-only.

native_pca9685.desc:
PCA9685 PWM/servo codec (services/pca9685): the PRESCALE computation from a PWM
frequency (with clamping), the per-channel register address, the servo pulse-width -> 12-bit
count conversion (with clamping), and the 5-byte channel PWM write encoder (including the
full-on/off flag). Pure - the I2C writes are ESP32-only.

native_ads1115.desc:
ADS1115 16-bit ADC codec (services/ads1115): building the 16-bit config word for a
single-shot single-ended reading (channel MUX, gain, data rate, start/mode/comparator bits,
with out-of-range fallbacks), and converting a signed 16-bit sample to microvolts across the
gain's full-scale range. Pure - the I2C transfer is ESP32-only.

native_ina219.desc:
INA219 current/power codec (services/ina219): decoding the bus-voltage register (bits
[15:3], LSB 4 mV, status bits ignored) and the shunt-voltage register (signed, LSB 10 uV),
computing the calibration register from the current LSB and shunt resistance, and scaling the
raw current / power registers. Pure - the I2C transfer is ESP32-only.

native_hpack.desc:
HPACK header compression for HTTP/2 (RFC 7541): prefix-integer coding (App C.1), the
Huffman string code (App B / C.4.1), the first-request decode with dynamic-table insertion
(C.3.1), dynamic-table indexing + FIFO eviction + size updates, and the server encoder
(static indexing + literal round-trip). Pure host codec.

native_h2frame.desc:
HTTP/2 binary framing (network_drivers/presentation/http2/h2_frame, RFC 9113): the
9-byte frame header parse/write (24-bit length, reserved-bit masking), SETTINGS build + parse
with validation, and the exact bytes of the SETTINGS-ACK / WINDOW_UPDATE / RST_STREAM / GOAWAY
/ PING-ACK / HEADERS / DATA builders. Pure host codec.

native_h2conn.desc:
HTTP/2 connection engine (network_drivers/presentation/http2/h2_conn, RFC 9113):
initial SETTINGS on init, preface + client SETTINGS -> SETTINGS ACK, decoding a real
HPACK-encoded request into the header callbacks, PING -> PING ACK, split-across-reads frame
reassembly, and h2_conn_respond serializing a HEADERS + DATA response decoded back.

native_quic_varint.desc:
QUIC variable-length integer codec (network_drivers/presentation/http3/quic_varint,
RFC 9000 sec 16) - the foundational HTTP/3 primitive: the Appendix A.1 worked examples (1/2/4/8
byte encodings), the non-minimal decode, length computation, and overflow / truncation guards.

native_h3frame.desc:
HTTP/3 framing (network_drivers/presentation/http3/h3_frame, RFC 9114 sec 7): the
type+length varint header parse/write (incl. a multi-byte length), the DATA / HEADERS /
SETTINGS / GOAWAY builders, the SETTINGS payload round-trip + reserved-id rejection, and the
reserved HTTP/2 frame-type check. Pure host codec.

native_jwt.desc:
JWT (HS256) bearer-auth verification. Pure crypto/codec - reuses the SSH
HMAC-SHA-256 + base64 primitives - so it unit-tests on the host.

native_upload.desc:
Streaming file upload: POST body -> FS file via the parser streaming hook.
Small BODY_BUF_SIZE exercises multi-chunk streaming; the mock FS captures the
written bytes (test/mocks/FS.h write-capture).

native_http_client.desc:
Outbound HTTP client: URL parser + request builder + response parser. Pure
string logic (the lwIP/mbedTLS transport is ESP32-only) so it unit-tests host.

native_compliance.desc:
RFC-compliance suite: builds with all enforcement at production defaults
(DETWS_ENFORCE_HOST_HEADER=1) and exercises the strict behaviors.

native_scratch.desc:
Shared per-dispatch scratch arena (session/scratch): bump-allocate + reset
semantics, alignment, and fail-closed exhaustion. Pure host tests - no
lwIP/sockets - so it builds from scratch.cpp alone.

native_inflate.desc:
RFC 1951 INFLATE core (the WebSocket permessage-deflate decompressor). Pure
codec - no sockets - so it unit-tests on the host against zlib-generated
vectors (scratchpad/gen_vectors.py).

native_deflate.desc:
RFC 1951 DEFLATE core (the WebSocket permessage-deflate compressor). Pure codec
- no sockets - so it unit-tests on the host by round-tripping through INFLATE
(which test_inflate validates against zlib), proving the emitted streams are
valid RFC 1951.

native_ssh_zlib.desc:
SSH server-to-client streaming compressor (zlib@openssh.com / zlib): a context-takeover
DEFLATE stream (persistent sliding window across packets, sync-flush per packet, zlib
wrapper). The whole session is one zlib stream, so concatenating packets and decoding via
inflate_raw (validated vs Python zlib in test_inflate) proves cross-packet back-references
resolve; packet-by-packet decodability under a reference zlib.decompressobj (OpenSSH's model)
is cross-checked out-of-tree.

native_ssh_comp.desc:
SSH s2c compression WIRING with the full SSH stack built with DETWS_ENABLE_SSH_ZLIB=1:
the compression owner (ssh_comp) + its NEWKEYS / USERAUTH_SUCCESS activation + the packet-layer
compress path in ssh_pkt_send. Drives the packet layer directly and reconstructs the continuous
zlib stream from the framed packets, decoding via inflate_raw. Compile-verifies every #if
DETWS_ENABLE_SSH_ZLIB block across transport / server / packet.

native_ws_deflate.desc:
WebSocket permessage-deflate (RFC 7692) inbound path wired through the real WS
stack: handshake negotiation, the RSV1 frame path, and INFLATE delivery (with
the table scratch borrowed from the shared arena). Runs test_websocket with the
feature on (the deflate cases are #if-gated).

native_time_source.desc:
Multi-source time fallback matrix (services/time_source): priority-ordered
query of user time sources with first-valid-wins fallback. Pure core - no
sockets/RTC - so it unit-tests on the host with mock sources.

native_config_store.desc:
Typed NVS config store (services/config_store): string/u32/blob round-trips,
defaults, capacity, erase/clear - run against the host in-memory backend (the
ESP32 Preferences/NVS backend is compiled in only on-target).

native_device_id.desc:
MAC-derived device UUID (services/device_id): RFC 4122 v5 from a MAC via SHA-1.
Pure core - the ESP32 MAC read is ARDUINO-gated - so it unit-tests on the host
against Python uuid.uuid5 reference values.

native_auth_lockout.desc:
Per-IP brute-force auth lockout (services/auth_lockout): exponential-backoff
lockout state machine. Pure core (the millisecond clock is passed in), so it
unit-tests on the host. DETWS_ENABLE_AUTH_LOCKOUT (and its required parent
DETWS_ENABLE_AUTH) are set so the flag-guarded code compiles.

native_csrf.desc:
Stateless HMAC-signed CSRF token (services/csrf): issue/verify with a fixed
secret unit-tests on the host (DETWS_ENABLE_CSRF set). Pulls in the SSH
HMAC-SHA256 + SHA-256 core.

native_telemetry.desc:
Telemetry math (services/telemetry): moving-window stats, rate-of-change, and
totalizer. Pure computation (synthetic clock passed in), so it unit-tests on
the host.

native_net_egress.desc:
Egress-interface reporting (network_drivers/physical). The esp_netif default-
route lookups are ESP32-only; the pure interface-key classifier host-tests here.

native_partition.desc:
Flash partition-map monitor (services/partition_monitor core): the kind
classifier + JSON serializer host-test here; the esp_partition walk is ESP32-only.

native_cbor.desc:
CBOR (RFC 8949) encoder (network_drivers/presentation/cbor): a pure byte-output
codec, host-tested against the RFC 8949 Appendix A vectors.

native_msgpack.desc:
MessagePack encoder (network_drivers/presentation/msgpack): a pure byte-output
codec, host-tested against the spec encodings.

native_gpio_map.desc:
GPIO pin-mapper / browser diag core (services/gpio_map): direction names, JSON
serializer, control-POST parser, output guard - all pure and host-tested.

native_udp_telemetry.desc:
UDP telemetry line builder (services/udp_telemetry): InfluxDB line-protocol
formatting, host-tested. The UDP cast is ESP32-only (#ifdef ARDUINO).

native_statsd.desc:
StatsD metrics client (services/statsd): the pure line formatter (name:value|type,
sample rate, DogStatsD tags) plus the count/gauge/timing/set emit helpers, whose sent
bytes are captured through the transport UDP service's host seam.

native_guardrails.desc:
Heap/stack guardrails (services/guardrails): threshold evaluator + JSON,
host-tested. Live sampling is ESP32-only (#ifdef ARDUINO).

native_failsafe.desc:
Software watchdog / deadlock detection + safe-state (services/failsafe): the wrap-safe
overdue predicate, the lifeline registry, fire-once-per-episode breach callback, and JSON.
Pure host tests with a synthetic clock.

native_sleep_sched.desc:
Dynamic sleep-cycle scheduler (services/sleep_sched): the wrap-safe idle->sleep-window
decision core with a doubling ramp clamped to a ceiling. Pure host tests, synthetic clock.

native_wearlevel.desc:
Flash wear-leveling slot selector (services/wearlevel): least-worn pick (ties -> lowest
index), saturating mark, and the wear-imbalance spread metric. Pure host tests - a 4000-write
pick+mark loop must level every slot exactly.

native_netadapt.desc:
Network adaptation decisions (services/netadapt): TCP receive-window sizing from the free
heap (reserve + quarter-of-spare, clamped) and the DHCP->static-IP fallback trigger. Pure host tests.

native_dshot.desc:
DShot ESC throttle codec (services/dshot): the 16-bit frame (11-bit value + telemetry +
4-bit nibble-xor CRC), the bidirectional inverted-CRC variant, decode/validate, and per-rate bit
timing. Pure host tests with hand-computed vectors.

native_hart.desc:
HART / HART-IP codec (services/hart): the HART command frame (longitudinal XOR checksum,
short + long addressing) build/parse and the 8-octet HART-IP message header. Pure host tests with
hand-verified vectors (command-0 checksum 0x82).

native_nts.desc:
Network Time Security codec (services/nts, RFC 8915): the NTS-KE TLV records (build the
standard request, parse a response) and the NTS NTP extension-field framing (unique id / cookie,
RFC 7822 4-byte padding). Pure host tests with spec-derived vectors.

native_dds.desc:
DDS / RTPS framing codec (services/dds): the 20-octet RTPS header (magic/version/vendor/
guidPrefix) and the submessage TLV (id/flags/octetsToNextHeader, endianness flag), build + parse.
Pure host tests with spec-derived vectors.

native_xmpp.desc:
XMPP stanza codec (services/xmpp, RFC 6120): XML-escaped stream/message/presence/iq
builders and the stanza-name + attribute readers. Pure host tests with exact-output vectors.

native_rawl2.desc:
Raw L2 Ethernet frame codec (services/rawl2): Ethernet II + 802.1Q VLAN build/parse and the
802.3 FCS (CRC-32). Pure host tests (FCS check value 0xCBF43926).

native_spa_router.desc:
Single-page-app micro-routing (services/spa_router): the serve-file / serve-shell /
passthrough decision from a request path (extension test + API prefix). Pure host tests.

native_goose.desc:
IEC 61850 GOOSE publisher codec (services/goose): the BER IECGoosePdu (gocbRef..allData,
minimal-length INTEGERs with the positive leading-zero rule) + the GOOSE header + Ethernet frame
(ethertype 0x88B8). Pure host tests with structural + spec-derived vectors.

native_mtconnect.desc:
MTConnect agent response codec (services/mtconnect, ANSI/MTC1.4): the incremental
MTConnectStreams builder (header + Samples/Events/Condition) and the MTConnectError document,
XML-escaped. Pure host tests with structural assertions.

native_j2735.desc:
SAE J2735 V2X codec (services/j2735): the ASN.1 UPER bit primitive layer (constrained
INTEGER / BOOLEAN / bit fields) and the BSMcore block encode/decode. Pure host tests with
hand-computed bit patterns (162-bit BSMcore -> 21 octets).

native_nema_ts2.desc:
NEMA TS 2 SDLC frame codec (services/nema_ts2): the traffic-cabinet bus frame
([address][control][frame-type][data][CRC-16/X-25]) build + validate. Pure host tests (CRC check
value 0x906E).

native_snp.desc:
GE Fanuc SNP serial frame codec (services/snp): the Series Ninety Protocol frame
([control][length][data][arithmetic-sum BCC]) build + validate. Pure host tests.

native_directnet.desc:
AutomationDirect DirectNET serial frame codec (services/directnet): the header (SOH +
ASCII-hex slave/type/addr/blocks + ETB + LRC) and data (STX + data + ETX + LRC) frames build/parse.
Pure host tests.

native_sep2.desc:
IEEE 2030.5 (SEP 2.0) resource codec (services/sep2): the DeviceCapability, EndDevice,
and DERControl XML documents (urn:ieee:std:2030.5:ns), XML-escaped. Pure host tests.

native_profinet.desc:
PROFINET DCP frame codec (services/profinet): the 10-octet DCP header + option/suboption
blocks (even-padding) build + parse/walk, for Identify/Set over raw L2 (ethertype 0x8892). Pure host
tests with spec-derived vectors.

native_ntcip.desc:
NTCIP transportation object OIDs (services/ntcip): the NTCIP 1202 signal-controller +
1203 DMS object roots under 1.3.6.1.4.1.1206.4.2 and the OID builder (root + instance index), for the
shipped SNMP agent. Pure host tests.

native_openadr.desc:
OpenADR 3.0 JSON codec (services/openadr): the event (programID + eventName + interval
payloads) and report (VEN reading) JSON documents build, with escaping + a no-stdlib 3-decimal
formatter. Pure host tests.

native_mms.desc:
IEC 61850 MMS PDU codec (services/mms): the BER confirmed-request/response Read PDUs
(invokeID + read service + named ObjectName), build + parse. Pure host tests with structural vectors.

native_cclink.desc:
CC-Link cyclic fieldbus frame codec (services/cclink): the frame ([station][command][bit
data][word data][sum]) build + parse and the bit/word process-image accessors. Pure host tests.

native_powerlink.desc:
Ethernet POWERLINK basic frame codec (services/powerlink): the EPL cyclic frames
([messageType][dest][source][payload]) - SoC/PReq/PRes/SoA - build + parse, over raw L2 (0x88AB).
Pure host tests.

native_sercos.desc:
SERCOS III motion-bus codec (services/sercos): the MDT/AT telegram (type + phase + cycle
+ data) build + parse and the 16-bit IDN encode/decode (S/P + set + block). Pure host tests.

native_profibus.desc:
PROFIBUS-DP FDL telegram codec (services/profibus): the SD1 (no-data) + SD2 (variable
data, LE/LEr + arithmetic-sum FCS) telegrams build + validate. Pure host tests with spec-derived
vectors.

native_lonworks.desc:
LonWorks / LON-IP network-variable codec (services/lonworks): the LonTalk NV PDU
([msg-code][14-bit selector][value]) build + parse and the SNVT_temp / SNVT_switch scalar encodings.
Pure host tests.

native_mbplus.desc:
Modbus Plus HDLC token-bus codec (services/mbplus): the HDLC frame (7E addr ctrl payload
CRC-16/X-25 7E) build + validate and the token-rotation ring helper. Pure host tests (CRC 0x906E).

native_interbus.desc:
INTERBUS summation-frame codec (services/interbus): the summation frame (loopback +
per-device 16-bit slices + CRC-16/CCITT FCS) assemble + disassemble. Pure host tests (FCS 0x29B1).

native_iccp.desc:
ICCP / TASE.2 (IEC 60870-6) Data_Value codec (services/iccp): the StateQ (state + quality)
and RealQ (scaled INTEGER + quality) indication-point BER structures with optional timestamp. Pure
host tests with spec-derived vectors.

native_wave.desc:
IEEE 1609 WAVE codec (services/wave): the 1609.3 WSMP header (version + P-encoded PSID +
length) build + parse, the PSID p-encoding, and the 1609.2 secured-message envelope header. Pure host
tests (carries J2735).

native_utmc.desc:
UTMC common-database codec (services/utmc): the UTMCRequest (object id) and UTMCResponse
(value + quality + timestamp) HTTP/XML documents build + the request-id parse, escaped. Pure host tests.

native_ocit.desc:
OCIT-Outstations message codec (services/ocit): the object message
([msg-type][object-type][instance][data-type][value]) build + parse and the typed-value accessors.
Pure host tests.

native_atc.desc:
ATC field-I/O interop snapshot (services/atc): serialize this device's field-I/O map
as {"inputs":[...],"outputs":[...]} JSON for an ATC engine over HTTP, plus the output setter and
value getter. Pure host tests.

native_southbound.desc:
Southbound protocol-driver framework (services/southbound): the bounded driver registry
(register / find / clear / count) and the name-dispatched read/write/read_block/write_block facade,
including capability + not-found handling and transport-error passthrough. Pure host tests.

native_exc_decoder.desc:
ESP32 panic / exception decoder (services/exc_decoder): parse a captured Guru Meditation
dump (cause, register PC + EXCVADDR, backtrace PC:SP frames) into a structured ExcInfo and serialize it
as JSON for a live /exception panel; tolerates missing fields + a trailing corruption marker. Pure host tests.

native_http_delivery.desc:
HTTP delivery optimizations (services/http_delivery): RFC 5861 stale-while-revalidate
decision + Cache-Control builder, RFC 7233 byte-range delta/offset fetch (X-Y / X- / -N parse + a 206
Content-Range), and a versioned service-worker precache manifest. Pure host tests.

native_hw_health.desc:
Hardware-health diagnostics (services/hw_health): power-rail voltage-drop logger (worst
droop + sag/brownout counts), SPI-bus CRC audit with hysteretic clock backoff, GPIO short-circuit test
(driven vs readback), and capacitor-leakage diag (measured vs expected RC decay). Pure host tests.

native_mdns_adaptive.desc:
Adaptive mDNS beacon scheduling (services/mdns_adaptive): RF-contention backoff/recovery
of the announce interval, the TTL/2 continuous-refresher cadence, the announce-due check, and the
auto-sleep beacon (announce before a sleep that would lapse the record). Wrap-safe. Pure host tests.

native_sockpool.desc:
Dynamic socket recycling (services/sockpool): a fixed LRU connection-slot pool - acquire
(free slot, else recycle the least-recently-used and report the evicted id), touch, release, find, and
in-use count. Pure host tests.

native_psram_pool.desc:
Buffer placement policy + DMA ping-pong (services/psram_pool): detws_psram_place picks
DRAM vs PSRAM by size / DMA requirement / free-heap headroom (large-cold to PSRAM, small-hot + DMA to
DRAM, leaving a DRAM reserve), plus the SPI DMA ping-pong double-buffer index bookkeeping. Pure host tests.

native_happy_eyeballs.desc:
Dual-stack Happy Eyeballs selection (services/happy_eyeballs): RFC 6724 destination
preference scoring, the candidate-list sort + RFC 8305 address-family interleave, and the Connection
Attempt Delay gate, over the shipped DetIp. Pure host tests.

native_wifi_sniffer.desc:
802.11 sniffer / traffic analyzer (services/wifi_sniffer): decode an 802.11 MAC header
(frame-control type/subtype + flags, ToDS/FromDS-dependent addresses), tally frames by type, and the
RSSI-hysteresis channel-agility roaming decision. Pure host tests.

native_link_manager.desc:
Multi-interface egress selection (services/link_manager): a table of interfaces (kind +
priority + up/down) with deterministic best-link-up selection, graceful escalation to a higher-priority
interface, failover when it drops, and real-transition change detection. Pure host tests.

native_cc1101.desc:
CC1101 sub-GHz radio driver (services/cc1101): the TI SPI header protocol (config
registers, command strobes, status registers, TX/RX FIFO) - init/detect, variable-length send, TX-done,
set-rx, packet recv with appended RSSI/LQI, and RSSI-to-dBm decode, against a mock chip. Host tests.

native_fdc2214.desc:
FDC2114/2214 capacitance-to-digital field sensor (services/fdc2214): the 28-bit data
combine + error flags, the frequency scale (data/2^28 * fref), and the single-channel config-sequence
builder. Pure codec host tests (the I2C binding is ESP32-only).

native_ldc1614.desc:
LDC1614 inductance-to-digital field sensor (services/ldc1614): the 28-bit data combine +
error flags, the frequency scale (data/2^28 * fref), and the single-channel config-sequence builder.
Pure codec host tests (the I2C binding is ESP32-only).

native_vl53l0x.desc:
VL53L0X time-of-flight ranging codec (services/vl53l0x): the range byte-pair combine to
millimeters, the interrupt-status data-ready decode, and the device range-status validity check. Pure
codec host tests (the I2C ranging binding is ESP32-only).

native_logbuf.desc: Rotating log ring + severity trap (services/logbuf): pure, fully host-tested.

native_config_io.desc:
Schema-driven config export/restore (services/config_io) over the config store;
round-trip host-tested against the in-memory backend.

native_workers.desc:
Core-partitioning invariant at N=2 (DETWS_WORKER_COUNT=2): each worker reaps
only its owned slots (check_timeouts ownership). Per-worker queue routing is
hardware-verified (the host queue mock ignores the handle).

native_codeql.desc:
CodeQL coverage env: the full app compiled with every new feature flag ON so
CodeQL traces the integration paths (CSRF / lockout / allowlist gates,
permessage-deflate) AND the new service modules, which the per-feature envs scan
only in isolation. Built (--without-testing) by the CodeQL workflow; one test
in the filter is enough to pull in the whole src set.

native_clock.desc:
Pluggable monotonic clock (services/det_clock): default millis(), custom clock
divided down to the internal 1000 Hz. Header-only, so no src to build.

native_concurrency.desc:
Concurrency proof for the cross-thread slot fields (DetAtomic state / rx_head /
rx_tail). Two threads drive one slot's SPSC ring with the production access
pattern; asserts byte-exact in-order delivery. Portable (-pthread), runs on any
host including Windows - this verifies the data integrity / logic.

native_tsan.desc:
Same harness under ThreadSanitizer: proves ZERO data races on the slot fields
(the DetAtomic acquire/release happens-before lets the plain rx_buffer[] writes
be read on the other core safely). TSan ships with clang/gcc on Linux, so this
env is run by the test CI (ubuntu); it is not buildable on the Windows host.

native_qpack.desc:
QPACK field-section compression for HTTP/3 (network_drivers/presentation/http3/qpack,
RFC 9204): the Appendix B.1 worked example (literal field line with a static name reference), the
encoder's exact bytes for an indexed / name-reference / literal-name field line, a round-trip
through all three representations, and rejection of any dynamic-table reference. Pure host codec.

native_quic_packet.desc:
QUIC packet header + packet-number codec (network_drivers/presentation/http3/quic_packet,
RFC 9000 sec 17): the long-header build/parse round-trip, a Version Negotiation packet (Version 0
+ supported-version list), the short (1-RTT) header parse, and packet-number truncation coding
against the Appendix A.2 (encode) and A.3 (decode) worked examples. Pure host codec.

native_quic_frame.desc:
QUIC frame codec (network_drivers/presentation/http3/quic_frame, RFC 9000 sec 19):
builder/parser round-trips for PADDING/PING/HANDSHAKE_DONE, ACK (single-range + a hand-built
multi-range-with-ECN cursor advance), CRYPTO, STREAM (with/without Offset, LEN-absent to packet
end), MAX_DATA, CONNECTION_CLOSE (transport + app), a multi-frame sequential parse, truncation.

native_quic_crypto.desc:
QUIC Initial packet crypto (network_drivers/presentation/http3/quic_hkdf + quic_aead +
quic_crypto, RFC 9001): HKDF-Expand-Label key derivation, AEAD_AES_128_GCM (software AES-128 +
GHASH) and header protection. Checked against FIPS 197 (AES block), GCM Test Case 4, and RFC 9001
Appendix A - A.1 secrets, A.3 server Initial byte-exact, A.2 client Initial + sample, A.4 Retry tag.

native_tls13_kdf.desc:
TLS 1.3 key schedule for the QUIC handshake (network_drivers/presentation/http3/tls13_kdf,
RFC 8446 sec 7.1 / 4.4.4): Early/Handshake/Master secret Extract chain, client/server handshake +
application traffic secrets, the server handshake write key/iv label path, and the server Finished
verify_data over a full ClientHello..CertificateVerify transcript. Pinned to RFC 8448 sec 3.

native_quic_tp.desc:
QUIC transport parameters codec (network_drivers/presentation/http3/quic_tp, RFC 9000
sec 18): the sec 18.2 defaults, an encode/parse round-trip over the connection IDs + every varint
parameter + the migration flag, parsing a hand-built byte string, skipping unknown/GREASE ids, and
rejecting a duplicate parameter, an oversized connection ID, and out-of-range values.

native_tls13_msg.desc:
TLS 1.3 handshake messages for the QUIC handshake (network_drivers/presentation/http3/
tls13_msg, RFC 8446 sec 4): ClientHello parse (X25519 key_share + capability flags), and the server
flight. Byte-exact vs RFC 8448 sec 3 for ServerHello / Certificate / Finished, plus the ALPN + QUIC
transport-params EncryptedExtensions and an Ed25519 CertificateVerify sign/verify round-trip.

native_quic_tls.desc:
TLS 1.3 server handshake state machine for QUIC (network_drivers/presentation/http3/
quic_tls, RFC 9001 / RFC 8446): a full interop round-trip - drive the server with a hand-built
ClientHello, run the client half of the key schedule independently, and confirm both sides derive
identical handshake + application secrets and the server accepts the client Finished. Plus
capability-negotiation rejections (no h3 ALPN, bad Finished) and partial-CRYPTO handling.

native_quic_conn.desc:
QUIC v1 server connection engine (network_drivers/presentation/http3/quic_conn, RFC 9000
/ RFC 9001): the test acts as a QUIC client - builds real Initial / Handshake / 1-RTT packets and
drives a server QuicConn through a full handshake (per-level AEAD, CRYPTO reassembly, ACKs,
coalescing, HANDSHAKE_DONE) and a 1-RTT request/response stream exchange.

native_h3_conn.desc:
HTTP/3 application engine (network_drivers/presentation/http3/h3_conn, RFC 9114): drives
h3_conn through the quic_conn callback seam - a QPACK-encoded request on a request stream dispatches
the right method/path (+ a POST body), the control stream sends SETTINGS on handshake completion,
and a response (HEADERS + DATA) round-trips through the QUIC stream send buffer.

native_h3_e2e.desc:
End-to-end HTTP/3 capstone (network_drivers/presentation/http3): a QUIC client in the
test completes the TLS 1.3 handshake against a quic_conn + h3_conn server, sends a real HTTP/3 GET
(QPACK HEADERS in a STREAM frame), and verifies the app-served response (HEADERS :status 200 + DATA
body) - the whole stack composed: QUIC crypto/framing, TLS 1.3, streams, HTTP/3 framing, QPACK.

native_quic_server.desc:
HTTP/3 server glue (network_drivers/presentation/http3/quic_server): the UDP-facing pool
that routes datagrams by Destination Connection ID to a pool of QuicConn + H3Conn engines. A QUIC
client in the test injects datagrams through the host ingest seam and captures the server's replies
through the output sink, driving a full handshake + HTTP/3 GET and verifying the 200 + body - the
same end-to-end flow as test_h3_e2e but through quic_server_begin / poll / respond, exercising the
connection-ID routing, the ingest ring, and new-connection creation from a client Initial.

native_h3_server.desc:
HTTP/3 dispatch bridge end-to-end through DetWebServer (the full Layer-7 app built with
DETWS_ENABLE_HTTP3=1): a QUIC client completes the handshake and sends an HTTP/3 GET, quic_server
routes it to the reserved dispatch slot, match_and_execute runs the registered route, and the
handler's send() is routed back onto the request stream via quic_server_respond. Verifies the whole
wire: a real route handler answers an HTTP/3 request. Reuses the native_app full-app base.

native_ssh_chachapoly.desc:
chacha20-poly1305@openssh.com AEAD (network_drivers/presentation/ssh): ChaCha20 vs RFC
8439 sec 2.3.2 block vector, Poly1305 vs RFC 8439 sec 2.5.2, and the OpenSSH construction
(length decode, encrypt/decrypt round-trip, tag-tamper + wrong-seqnr rejection). Pure host crypto.
